chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 337 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main petition. 15.10.2020 Ms. Abida Hashmi, advocate for petitioner. ----------- Through the instant petition, petitioner Mst. Rukhsana Nusratullah has prayed for the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in respect of moveable and immoveable properties/assets, details whereof are mentioned in the Schedule of Properties attached with the memo of petition, available at page 17, which were left by her deceased husband, namely, Nusratullah Nusrat s/o. Nawazish Ali, who allegedly died on 12th December, 2018 at Karachi, leaving behind Mst. Rukhsana Nusratullah (widow), Nazish Nusratullah (daughter) and Nawazish Ali (son) as his legal heirs. Original Death Certificate of deceased as well as photostat copies of Family Registration Certificate, issued by the NADRA, title documents of the immovable properties, share certificates and documents of vehicle are also filed at page 13,15 and 23-59. Legal heirs No. 2 & 3 have filed their Affidavits of No-Objection for the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in favour of the petitioner. Two witnesses, namely, Moosa Bin Asim s/o. Asim Iftikhar and Saud s/o. Abdur Rasheed have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record. 2 Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi and Lahore dated 2nd September, 2020; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 10th September, 2020.

Abdur Rasheed have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record. 2 Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi and Lahore dated 2nd September, 2020; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 10th September, 2020. Today petitioner and legal heirs No. 2 & 3 as well as above named witnesses are present. They affirm the contents of memo of petition as well as their affidavits and also verify their signatures made thereon. Since all the legal formalities/requirements have been fulfilled, there is no impediment in grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration to petitioner, therefore, the petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in respect of movable and immovable properties/assets shown in the Schedule of Properties, as per rules. J U D G E Athar Zai
